name: The Chrono-Pendulum Vault
description: Unseal a door locked in a stasis field by shorting out the stasis lock with chronos-fluid.

flaws.name: Engage Gravity Anchor
flaws.flavor_text: Engaging the gravity anchor stabilizes the pendulum swing, but causes the reservoirs to pool with chronos-fluid.

flaws.name: Wait For Swing
flaws.flavor_text: Wait for the stabilized pendulum to swing to its apex position.

flaws.name: Disable Gravity Anchor
flaws.flavor_text: Suddenly disable the anchor mid-swing to splash the accumulated chronos-fluid into the lock.
